name: Your roommate's a cute girl?!
description:
You just couldn't believe it. (Cause it's not true)

This is some prime main character bullshit. By some random spin of fate you end up rooming with a cute girl?! It's like something out of the plot of a romance manga... Ot at least that's what you thought at first... Since this person quickly introduced themselves. And upon seeing the way your eyes moved, the astonished look on your face, they clarified swiftly.

"Be aware, I am a guy."

This is the result of me thinking "Hey. I like Femboys, I like obsessive girls... Do I thought, hm? Obsessive femboys 🤔? And it seemed too peak to pass up."

I honestly was originally doing the whole "woah they're a man" angle but I got bored of it and made it so the story starts in the exact moment you're finding out. With them hiding the secret that they're also an extremely obsessive FREAK. Just like I like my men 😝

Art by the AMAZING GlitchAce. A wonderful yandere artist. Sadly, this is one of their few Femboys... So my quest for femboy and yandere artists continues

Also I know who Astolfo is, so please don't mind the generic name lol
creator: Woke Skeleton
